name: com.baseprojectpackages.core
description: A collection of reusable core systems that any Unity project can build on. It provides a service locator, an event bus, timers, scene loading, audio, input, object pooling and a data driven tweening system. It also includes a menu framework, priority based cursor and timescale control, tooltips and an in-game debug menu with a cheat console and a log console. Everything lives under the Base.CorePackage namespace and ships with matching editor tooling.
